x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Exposes DSNY's already-existing but undocumented first-party APIs (collection-schedule geocoder, ePickups pickup-request API, CFC appointment API) plus the 51 DSNY Open Data datasets behind one agent contract.

server.name: io.nyc.dsny
server.title: NYC Sanitation (DSNY)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Sanitation — collection schedules, districts and frequencies, drop-off sites (e-waste, food scrap, special waste, recycling bins), litter baskets, and monthly tonnage. Documents DSNY's hidden first-party APIs (the collection-schedule geocoder, the ePickups pickup-request API, the CFC appointment API) behind one owned surface; adds a bulk-pickup scheduling contract.
server.instructions: Use get_collection_schedule for 'when is my trash/recycling/compost collected?' (fronts the DSNY geocoder). find_districts / get_district cover DSNY operational districts and collection frequencies. find_drop_off_sites answers 'where can I drop off electronics / food scraps / batteries?'. find_litter_baskets queries the corner-basket inventory. find_tonnage answers 'how much did my district recycle?' from Open Data. schedule_bulk_pickup (net-new) requires an authenticated user and mutates state — confirm items, address, and date with the user before submitting.

tools.name: get_collection_schedule
tools.title: Get Collection Schedule
tools.description: Look up refuse, recycling, and organics collection days for a NYC address. Fronts the undocumented dsnypublic.nyc.gov/dsny/api/geocoder/DSNYCollection backend.

tools.name: find_districts
tools.title: Find Sanitation Districts
tools.description: List DSNY operational districts and their per-stream collection frequencies, optionally by borough.

tools.name: get_district
tools.title: Get Sanitation District
tools.description: Get a DSNY district (e.g. 'MN01') and its collection frequencies by code.

tools.name: find_drop_off_sites
tools.title: Find Drop-Off Sites
tools.description: Search drop-off sites for electronics, food scraps/compost, special waste, recycling bins, or reuse/donation, by material type, borough, or district.

tools.name: find_litter_baskets
tools.title: Find Litter Baskets
tools.description: Search the citywide DSNY corner litter-basket inventory by section and/or basket type.

tools.name: find_tonnage
tools.title: Find Tonnage
tools.description: Query monthly DSNY collection tonnage (refuse, recycling, organics) by borough, community district, and month range ('how much did my district recycle?'). From Open Data.

tools.name: schedule_bulk_pickup
tools.title: Schedule Bulk Pickup
tools.description: Schedule a bulk / large-item, CFC-appliance, electronics, or special-waste pickup appointment. NET-NEW owned contract over the existing but undocumented ePickups backend. Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm items, address, and date with the user first.
